name: Vertiseit AB (publ)
summary: Vertiseit AB (publ) operates as a digital signage provider in Sweden. The company designs and develops strategy and concept, and content and user experience; operates a Web based CMS portal to manage and schedule content and create dynamic experiences; and monitors and manages digital signage solutions. It also engages in the installation, operation, and assets management of technology products, such as RFID, iBeacons, sensors, etc. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Varberg, Sweden.
